title: 夕暮れ時のオペラオー劇場

text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are on our way back to the
academy, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, my silhouette is framed by the twilit sky,
intensifying my glow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So how can this be?! Look around you, Trainer!

People, probably on their way home from work,
are walking in and out of the nearby train station.
They all look exhausted.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! My heart aches at the sight! Here they are,
in the presence of the Overlord, yet they all look
so downtrodden!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, I have come to a decision. I will perform
an opera, at this very moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My radiance, filled with affection, shall become a
fountain, watering their wilted souls!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will take the starring role, with you as my
support!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Naturally! You are my trainer. We aim for the
same glorious stage, do we not?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, let us begin the Evening Opera O Theater with full pomp and splendor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, you people on the move! ♪ Why must you
look to your feet?

T.M. Opera O glances my way as if to say, "That's
your cue."
choice_data_list: I guess I'll have to sing!
I guess I'll have to dance!

text_block_list.text:
Mustering my courage, I pick up where she left
off.
choice_data_list:
Lalalaaa... When you're lost on the road of
life... ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Open your eyes, lift your chin. ♪ And you might
behold my glaring sheen.♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am your shining light. ♪ I am your guiding
light. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look to me when it's all too much. ♪ Look to me
when you need a special touch. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I will relieve your woe! ♪ Why? Because I am...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The light that makes the world shiiine! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: T.M. ♪ OPERA OOOOO! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
With that, the curtain falls on the Opera O
theater.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, my presence should be ingrained in
your hearts forever more.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Please, think of me when the going gets tough!
For I am watching over you all!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: I don't have a clue why, but seeing someone with that much confidence is... infectious!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Well, time to get back at it! Thanks for the lift!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: At last, these empty husks have life again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! All in a day's work—for I am the sun
that brightens the spirit of humanity!

I'm impressed once again by Opera O's curious
charm, even if her sudden antics are a constant
surprise.

Doing my best to recall her lessons, I start
dancing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Nice footwork, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I cannot allow you to steal the spotlight!
Haah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've the elegance of a swan! The might of an
eagle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let our dance bring hope to the people!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a clue why, but... I suddenly feel like
dancing!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I think watching them just made me feel a little
better!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! The people have life in their eyes once
again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...I must say though, I'm impressed you kept up
with my dance to the end!
choice_data_list:
I may have gone a little too hard. It's all a blur
to me...

I may have gone a little too hard. It's all a blur
to me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
These are the results of you basking in my
presence day in and day out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, burn my image into your mind and bring out
your talents to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not restrain yourself! Unleash! Unleash!

Our special opera performance is over, but we're
still the center of attention.

I'm impressed once again by Opera O's curious
charm, even if her sudden antics are a constant
surprise.
